title: OpenAPI Validator Configuration
description: Configuration for the OpenAPI Validator extension. Validates HTTP requests against an OpenAPI specification.

spec.description: OpenAPI specification in YAML or JSON format.

max_body_bytes.description: Maximum request body size in bytes for validation. 0 means no limit. Defaults to 0.

allow_unmatched_paths.description: If true, allow requests to paths not defined in the spec. Defaults to false.

dry_run.description: If true, log validation failures without rejecting requests. Defaults to false.

deny_response.description: Custom response returned when validation fails.

DataSource.description: A data source provided either inline or as a file path. Exactly one must be set.

inline.description: Data provided directly as a string.

file.description: Path to a file containing the data.

LocalResponse.description: Custom local HTTP response to send to the client.
